name: Asparagus Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole dish, layer the ingredients as follows: half of the crumbled saltine crackers.
2. Add half of the cooked asparagus pieces.
3. Add half of the sliced pimientos.
4. Mix the mushroom soup with the juice from the pimientos and add to the layers.
5. Sprinkle half of the grated cheddar cheese over the vegetables.
6. Repeat steps 1-5 using the remaining ingredients.
7. Top the casserole with additional grated cheese or crumbled potato chips.
8. Place in a moderate oven (375°F) and bake until bubbly and the topping is browned.
